data.title: Energea Finances Start of Construction at 140 MW Iron Spur Solar Project in Texas
data.description: Energea, a prominent renewable energy developer, has commenced construction on the Iron Spur Solar project in Snyder, Texas. This utility-scale solar power installation boasts a capacity of 140 MW DC and is anticipated to be fully operational by early 2029. Energea facilitated the financing for this venture, showcasing their commitment to sustainable energy initiatives. Notably, Iron Spur Solar has finalized an exclusivity agreement with an investment-grade corporate energy consumer for a prolonged Power Purchase Agreement. This strategic partnership underscores the project's viability and contribution to the renewable energy sector.

data.title: Centuri Holdings, Inc. to Report First Quarter 2026 Results on May 6th, 2026
data.description: Centuri Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: CTRI), a prominent utility and energy infrastructure services company based in North America, is set to release its first quarter results for 2026 on May 6th. Following this, the Company will conduct an earnings conference call on May 7th at 10:00 AM ET / 7:00 AM PT to delve into the financial outcomes and key business updates. This call will provide insights into Centuri's performance in the long run.

data.title: NextDecade Provides First Quarter 2026 Business Update
data.description: In Houston, NextDecade Corporation (NASDAQ: NEXT) shared its Q1 2026 progress, highlighting advancements at the Rio Grande LNG Facility. CEO Matt Schatzman noted the company's swift movement towards the first LNG production. Collaborating with Bechtel, they aim to construct the trains securely, within budget, and ahead of schedule. Phase 1 developments are exceeding the guaranteed placeholder.
KASHKARI STATED THAT BEFORE THE WAR, INFLATION WAS EXPECTED TO DROP, JUSTIFYING ANOTHER RATE CUT THIS YEAR; HOWEVER, MARCH'S EVENTS DID NOT SIGNIFICANTLY CHANGE THE POLICY STATEMENT.
KASHKARI WARNED THAT A LONG CLOSURE OF THE STRAIT COULD UPSET INFLATION EXPECTATIONS AND NEED A STRONG POLICY ACTION.
KASHKARI SAYS THAT EVEN IF THE STRAIT OF HORMUZ OPENS SOON, INFLATION WILL REMAIN HIGH, REQUIRING RATES TO STAY UNCHANGED FOR A LONG TIME.
MINNEAPOLIS FED'S KASHKARI DISAGREED AT THE FOMC MEETING, ARGUING THAT UNCERTAINTY IN THE STRAIT OF HORMUZ SHOULD BE REFLECTED IN THE FED'S RATE HIKE STATEMENTS.
KASHKARI WARNED THAT A SIGNIFICANT PRICE SURGE COULD THREATEN INFLATION EXPECTATIONS, POSSIBLY FORCING THE FED TO RAISE RATES MULTIPLE TIMES TO MAINTAIN ITS 2% INFLATION GOAL.
NOVO NORDISK WILL LAUNCH OZEMPIC® TABLETS IN THE US ON MAY 4, THE FIRST ORAL PEPTIDE GLP-1 DRUG APPROVED BY THE FDA FOR ADULTS WITH TYPE 2 DIABETES.
NOVO NORDISK GOT APPROVAL FOR OZEMPIC PILLS, THE FIRST ORAL GLP-1 FOR REDUCING CARDIOVASCULAR RISKS IN TYPE 2 DIABETES.

data.title: KIKO Milano Makes U.S. Retail Debut with National Launch at Macy's
data.description: On May 1, 2026, KIKO Milano, the top makeup brand in Italy, announced its expansion in the U.S. through a partnership with Macy's, a renowned department store. The initiative will kick off on June 6 at Macy's Herald Square. Macy's, a prominent retail destination in the country, will showcase KIKO Milano's products nationwide.

data.title: Oppenheimer Holdings Inc. Reports First Quarter 2026 Earnings
data.description: Oppenheimer Holdings Inc. disclosed a net loss of $20.6 million, equivalent to $(1.93) per share for the initial quarter of 2026. This marks a significant downturn from the previous year, which saw a net income of $30.7 million, translating to $2.93 in basic earnings per share.

data.title: Peacock Takes Flight: United Launches New Inflight Entertainment Channel
data.description: United Airlines has enhanced its in-flight entertainment by introducing the Peacock channel, showcasing popular series like The Traitors and All Her Fault. The airline now provides passengers with a selection of over 1,600 hours of content, ensuring a premium viewing experience for all flyers.

data.title: Blue Cross Blue Shield of Massachusetts Celebrates National Bike Month with Free $20 Bluebikes Credits
data.description: The biggest health plan in the state is introducing a Bluebikes credit program to promote biking in May. In line with National Bike Month and National Mental Health Awareness Month, Blue Cross Blue Shield is providing incentives for individuals to enjoy the physical and mental health advantages of cycling.

data.title: BEVERLY HILLS SPORTS COUNCIL AND MVP SPORTS GROUP REUNITE TO FORM EVOLV SPORTS MANAGEMENT
data.description: Two leading agencies in professional baseball, Beverly Hills Sports Council (BHSC) and MVP Sports Group (MVP), have come together to create EVOLV Sports Management. This merger represents a combined representation of over $6 billion in contracts. The announcement was made in Los Angeles on May 1, 2026. EVOLV Sports Management will now represent a significant number of athletes in the baseball industry.

data.title: Reklaim Ltd Reports 2025 Year-End Results Highlighting Strategic Investment Phase and Q4 Operational Improvement
data.description: Reklaim Ltd. (TSXV: MYID) (OTC: MYIDF) has wrapped up 2025 with enhanced efficiency after investing in product and commercial capabilities midway through the year, setting the stage for increased growth in an AI-focused data economy. The company's financial report for the year ending December 31, 2025, reveals total revenue of $4,992,060, a slight 2% drop from the previous year. Gross margins held steady at 78%, highlighting the company's scalability. The strategic decision to reinvest in AI product development and commercial infrastructure during the year resulted in improved operating performance in the fourth quarter as these investments began to yield returns. This signifies a positive trajectory for Reklaim as it looks towards future expansion.

data.title: Quantum to Participate at the Needham Technology, Media & Consumer Conference on May 14
data.description: Quantum Corporation (NASDAQ: QMCO) shared that its CEO, Hugues Meyrath, and CFO, William White, are set to partake in the upcoming Needham Technology, Media & Consumer Conference, scheduled for May 14, 2026. This event will be conducted virtually. During the conference, management will be accessible for pre-arranged conference calls with investors, and those interested in scheduling a meeting with management can reach out to Needham & Co. to request one.

data.title: Nebius Group Announces Date of First Quarter 2026 Results and Conference Call
data.description: In Amsterdam, Nebius Group N.V. (NASDAQ: NBIS) is set to announce its first quarter 2026 financial results on May 13, 2026, before the market opens. A conference call to review the results is scheduled for 8:00 a.m. Eastern Time on the same day, which is 5:00 a.m. Pacific Time or 2:00 p.m. Central European Time. The registration link for the webcast and replay can be found on Nebius Group's Investor Relations website.

data.title: Alight Strengthens Leadership Team With Appointment of Dinesh Tulsiani as President of Employer Solutions and Susan Davies as Interim Chief Financial Officer
data.description: In Chicago, recent appointments of a President and Interim CFO highlight a renewed emphasis on innovation, operational efficiency, and aiding clients in achieving superior outcomes on a larger scale.

data.title: NUVVE JAPAN Appoints Shigeki Mori, Former THECOO CFO, as Executive Officer of Finance
data.description: NUVVE JAPAN K.K. (NVJ), a top provider of energy management and Vehicle-to-Grid (V2G) solutions and a subsidiary of Nuvve Holding Corp. based in the U.S., has named Shigeki Mori as Executive Officer of Finance (CFO), starting from May 2026. Mori, known for his expertise in startup finance, has successfully guided high-growth technology firms to the public market. He previously held the position of Director and CFO at THECOO Inc. This move aims to enhance NVJ's financial operations and strategic growth initiatives.
